name: code-research
description: Expert code research using GitHub CLI for repository discovery, code search, and deep analysis. Use this skill when you need to: (1) Understand how popular libraries/frameworks work internally, (2) Find implementation patterns across GitHub repositories, (3) Research and compare technologies or libraries, (4) Investigate bugs by searching for similar issues and fixes, (5) Analyze repository architecture and structure, (6) Find real-world code examples, or (7) Analyze pull requests for impleme...
